creator: robi@nunnisoft.ch
text:
Edwin Groothuis ha scritto:
> Maintainer of www/joomla15,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/135386 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/135386
> 

Thank you for the patch, but.. wait.. I don't see a patch
for pkg-plist.. that's suspect to me.. I'll take a look as
soon as possible.

-- 
Robi
